synopsis:
The High Republic 7 is the seventh issue of the canon comic book series Star Wars: The High Republic.
KEEVE TRENNIS has put everything on the line to save her former master, but the scars run deep.
As AVAR KRISS summons a task force to deal with the DRENGIR THREAT, a desperate NIHIL REMNANT attacks a distant outpost. Can Keeve fight back the shadows long enough to stand for light and life? Guest-starring ORLA JARENI, Jedi Wayseeker.
title: The High Republic (2021) #07
